rag_rules: Use `guarantee` for output dependency contracts in component type annexes
Place assumptions and guarantees in component type annexes when they reference component ports
Use `eq` for deterministic output expressions in component type annexes
Avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
generic_rules: Use concrete bounds, named constants, or visible relations for assumptions and guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types
Use valid AGREE scalar types (int, real, bool) for declarations
Avoid AADL property names in AGREE expressions unless exposed as ports or constants
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `eq name : type = expression;` for deterministic output expressions
Use `const name : type = value;` for named constants
anti_patterns: Do not use implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type annexes
Do not encode AADL timing properties as AGREE expressions
Do not use invalid AGREE scalar type names
Do not assume AADL property names are automatically in AGREE expression scope
